title: 'Making May 1 A Central Holiday My Greatest Achievement': MDMK's Vaiko Recalls Labour Day History
description: On May Day, MDMK MP Vaiko recalled the historic labour struggles of 1886 and Tamil Nadu’s role in recognizing May 1 as a holiday. He highlighted his 1990 request to then Prime Minister VP Singh that led to May Day being declared a central government holiday, calling it one of his greatest achievements. Labour Day continues to honor workers’ rights and highlight the need for fair wages and safe conditions.
